summary: The 'nuniesmith/futures' monorepo is a mature, production-grade futures trading co-pilot with Python ML (87% acc CNN breakout detection), FastAPI/HTMX dashboard, NinjaTrader 8 C# integration via Bridge, Docker Compose orchestration, Redis/Postgres persistence, and Prometheus/Grafana monitoring. Strengths include 30+ pytest suite, excellent docs, CI/CD, and multi-repo consolidation. Critical gaps: missing TPT 4PM hard flatten risking account termination, unvalidated ONNX/PyTorch parity, committed DLLs supply-chain risk, and minor UI/security issues prevent live prop trading readiness.
priority_actions: Implement TPT 4PM ET hard flatten in BreakoutStrategy.cs with session-end risk block
Validate and automate ONNX/PyTorch inference parity in CI for v6 18-feature model
Secure committed DLLs with checksum verification in deploy_nt8.ps1 and add secret scanning to CI
Add Pydantic validation and rate limiting to all FastAPI data/api endpoints
Deploy/test NT8 full session verifying tabular dim=18, TP3 mults, and no errors

findings.title: Missing TPT 4PM Hard Flatten
findings.description: BreakoutStrategy.cs lacks time-based position flatten at 16:00 ET for Take Profit Trader compliance, risking overnight holds and account termination (todo.md emphasizes criticality).
findings.recommendation: Add OnBarUpdate guard: if TptMode && ET hour>=16 && positions>0, FlattenAll('TPT_HARD_STOP'); unblock at 18:00 ET. Test in sim/live.

findings.title: Unvalidated ONNX/PyTorch Parity
findings.description: TODO pending parity check on models/breakout_cnn_best.* despite v6 18-features; risks Python engine/NT8 divergence.
findings.recommendation: Extend test_phase3_ema9_parity.py for batch inference; assert max abs diff <1e-4. Automate in CI via pytest.

findings.title: Committed OnnxRuntime DLLs Without Checksums
findings.description: src/ninja/dll/ binaries risk supply-chain tampering; no verification in deploy_nt8.ps1.
findings.recommendation: Add SHA256 checksums in deploy_nt8.ps1; verify before copy to NT8 Custom/. Prefer NuGet restore if NT8 supports.

findings.title: FastAPI Endpoints Lack Input Validation
findings.description: data/api/*.py routers (e.g., positions, sar, trades) miss Pydantic models/Depends(rate_limit), exposing to injection/malformed requests.
findings.recommendation: Add strict Pydantic schemas and rate_limit dependency to all POST/PUT/DELETE; audit for SQLi/XSS.

findings.title: Monorepo Python+C# Complexity
findings.description: src/lib (Python) + src/ninja (C#/DLLs) mixes langs; pyproject.toml ignores C#, deploy patches csproj manually.
findings.recommendation: Add dotnet format/lint/test to .github/workflows/ci-cd.yml; document NT8 build isolation; consider ninja/ subrepo.

findings.title: Potential API Key Exposure in Docs/Env
findings.description: README.md/.env.example show placeholders; docker-compose.yml interpolates secrets without rotation guidance.
findings.recommendation: Confirm .env in .gitignore; add GitHub secret scanning; rotate MASSIVE/XAI/KRAKEN keys; use Vault in prod.

findings.title: Forex Tick Precision in UI Asset Cards
findings.description: Low-ATR forex (6E) collapses entry/stop/TP due to 4-decimal rounding vs 5-decimal tick (todo.md).
findings.recommendation: In src/lib/services/web/main.py _compute_entry_zone(), use MICRO_CONTRACT_SPECS tick_size for precision.

findings.title: No C# Unit Tests
findings.description: Python has 30+ tests; C# (BreakoutStrategy.cs) relies on manual NT8 Analyzer.
findings.recommendation: Add NUnit tests for range builders/phases/MTF; run dotnet test in CI.

findings.title: Duplicated Data Fetch Logic
findings.description: Cache→DB→API repeated across services/training; no unified DataResolver.
findings.recommendation: Implement DataResolver in src/lib/services/data/main.py for Redis→Postgres→Massive/Kraken with backfill.

findings.title: No Trading/Review UI Modes
findings.description: Dashboard cluttered in trading; no toggle (todo.md).
findings.recommendation: Add localStorage toggle in web/main.py; CSS .mode-trading/.mode-review.

findings.title: No Trainer UI Separation
findings.description: Trainer UI proxied; should be /train page with API-only trainer_server.
findings.recommendation: Extract to web /train; remove trainer_ui endpoint.

findings.title: Heavy Optional Deps Without Lockfile
findings.recommendation: Add uv/pip-compile lockfile; pin GPU deps in docker/trainer/Dockerfile.

strengths: Comprehensive 30+ pytest suite covering ORB, ICT, risk, scheduler, integrations, parity
Modular architecture: lib/analysis/core/services separation; feature_contract.json enforces model parity
Production Docker Compose (7 services w/healthchecks), Tailscale CI/CD w/Discord notifies
Full observability: structlog, Prometheus/Grafana dashboards provisioned
Mature ML: 87.1% acc champion CNN, ONNX export, balanced dataset gen w/13 breakout types
Excellent docs: README/todo.md/STRATEGY_PLAN.md; monorepo w/all training/C#/deploys
weaknesses: Mixed Python/C# langs complicate CI/testing; no C# linter/tests
Heavy deps (torch optional-GPU, onnxruntime); models/DLLs bloat repo (~80MB LFS)
UI noisy (Grok auto-poll, no modes); forex precision bug
Duplicated data resolver logic; Kraken training pending
No input validation on some APIs; committed binaries risk
TODO-heavy todo.md despite clean code (20+ items)
tech_debt: Kraken keys in CI secrets + full training integration
Feature contract drift detection in C#
C# NUnit tests + dotnet lint in CI
next_steps: Run full tests/lint: pytest src/tests/ && ruff check src/
NT8 deploy/test: scripts/deploy_nt8.bat -Launch; verify logs (dim=18, TP3 mults)
Docker up w/monitoring: docker compose --profile monitoring up; check localhost:8180
Fix high findings: TPT flatten, ONNX parity, DLL checksums
Kraken training: add keys to CI/.env; test dataset_generator w/Kraken
Live session test NT8/Python side-by-side; audit logs
Add C# tests/DataResolver; retrain if needed: scripts/smoke_test_trainer.py
